purpose: Round311 records the anti-regression rules for the current fluid-learning public site after the 181103 HTML conversion and real-exam count correction.

htmlContentBoundary.rule: 181103 materials are served as standalone HTML content pages. Public routes must not expose raw file downloads or old wrapper metadata.

publicShellBoundary.legacyLedgerPolicy: If /data/fluid-round309-181103-html-content.json is still public, it must be sanitized and must not contain old wrapper metadata, raw download URLs, or local paths.

privateVideoBoundary.claimRule: Do not claim private-video production recovery until Cloudflare production has FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA and real teacher/student browser QA has run.

onlineProofRequired: release gate and public browser gate

acceptance.meaning: Current release surfaces must stay on 325/68/217 real-exam counts, serve 181103 as standalone HTML content pages rather than wrapper/download artifacts, and keep private-video production recovery blocked until R2 and real-account QA prove it.
